profile-a.summary: 根据您的数据分析，整体健康状况良好。建议继续保持当前的作息和运动习惯。
microTips: 保持每周至少 150 分钟中等强度运动
持续关注睡眠质量，保持 7-8 小时的充足睡眠

profile-b.summary: 根据您的数据分析，建议关注睡眠质量和运动量。近期数据有一定波动，需要更多关注。
microTips: 睡前 1 小时避免使用电子设备
每天增加 3000 步可有效改善整体健康

profile-c.summary: 根据您的数据分析，存在明显的压力过大和睡眠不足问题，建议优先调整作息和压力管理策略。

严重睡眠不足时请考虑咨询专业医生

profile-a.summary: Based on your data analysis, overall health is in good shape. Continue maintaining your current routine and exercise habits.
microTips: Keep up at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity exercise per week
Continue monitoring sleep quality and aim for 7-8 hours of restful sleep

profile-b.summary: Based on your data analysis, consider paying more attention to sleep quality and physical activity. Recent data shows some fluctuation that warrants closer monitoring.
microTips: Avoid using electronic devices 1 hour before bedtime
Adding 3,000 daily steps can effectively improve overall health
Moderate aerobic exercise can help improve sleep quality

profile-c.summary: Based on your data analysis, there are clear signs of excessive stress and insufficient sleep. Prioritize adjusting your routine and stress management strategies.
microTips: Deep breathing exercises can help relieve stress — try practicing daily
Avoid using electronic devices 1 hour before bedtime
If sleep deprivation persists, consider consulting a healthcare professional
